1600	func (dn *Daemon) getHealth() error {
1601		klog.V(4).Info("Kubelet health running")
1602		ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), kubeletHealthzTimeout)
1603		defer cancel()
1604	
1605		req, err := http.NewRequest("GET", dn.kubeletHealthzEndpoint, nil)
1606		if err != nil {
1607			return err
1608		}
1609		req = req.WithContext(ctx)
1610	
1611		client := http.Client{}
1612		resp, err := client.Do(req)
1613		if err != nil {
1614			return err
1615		}
1616		defer resp.Body.Close()
1617	
1618		respData, err := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)
1619		if err != nil {
1620			return err
1621		}
1622	
1623		if string(respData) != "ok" {
1624			klog.Warningf("Kubelet Healthz Endpoint returned: %s", string(respData))
1625			return nil
1626		}
1627	
1628		klog.V(4).Info("Kubelet health ok")
1629	
1630		return nil
1631	}

1633	// syncFinalizationFailureAnnotation proxies any failures of ostree-finalize-staged
1634	// from the previous boot to an explicit node annotation, since it is very
1635	// likely to be a root cause.
1636	func (dn *Daemon) syncFinalizationFailureAnnotation(finalizeError string) error {
1637		if finalizeError != "" {
1638			klog.Warningf("Failed to finalize previous deployment: %s", finalizeError)
1639			// Truncate this to a reasonable size in case it's somehow very long
1640			finalizeError = fmt.Sprintf("%.2000s", finalizeError)
1641		} else {
1642			klog.Infof("Previous boot ostree-finalize-staged.service appears successful")
1643		}
1644	
1645		// Cache it globally so we can include it in any other error messages if applicable
1646		dn.previousFinalizationFailure = finalizeError
1647	
1648		// If there's no node writer, there's no annotations to sync
1649		if dn.nodeWriter == nil {
1650			return nil
1651		}
1652		_, ok := dn.node.Annotations[constants.MachineConfigDaemonFinalizeFailureAnnotationKey]
1653		// In the happy path where there's no error and no annotation, we're done
1654		if finalizeError == "" && !ok {
1655			return nil
1656		}
1657	
1658		// And let's emit this as an event
1659		if dn.previousFinalizationFailure != finalizeError {
1660			dn.nodeWriter.Eventf(corev1.EventTypeWarning, "FailedFinalization", finalizeError)
1661		}
1662	
1663		annos := map[string]string{
1664			constants.MachineConfigDaemonFinalizeFailureAnnotationKey: finalizeError,
1665		}
1666		_, err := dn.nodeWriter.SetAnnotations(annos)
1667		return err
1668	}

59	func runStartCmd(_ *cobra.Command, _ []string) {
60		flag.Set("logtostderr", "true")
61		flag.Parse()
62	
63		// This is 'main' context that we thread through the controller context and
64		// the leader elections. Cancelling this is "stop everything, we are shutting down".
65		runContext, runCancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
66	
67		// To help debugging, immediately log version
68		klog.Infof("Version: %+v (%s)", version.Raw, version.Hash)
69	
70		cb, err := clients.NewBuilder(startOpts.kubeconfig)
71		if err != nil {
72			ctrlcommon.WriteTerminationError(fmt.Errorf("creating clients: %w", err))
73		}
74	
75		run := func(ctx context.Context) {
76			go common.SignalHandler(runCancel)
77	
78			// Start the metrics handler
79	
80			ctrlctx := ctrlcommon.CreateControllerContext(ctx, cb)
81	
82			// Early start the config informer because feature gate depends on it
83			ctrlctx.ConfigInformerFactory.Start(ctrlctx.Stop)
84			if fgErr := ctrlctx.FeatureGatesHandler.Connect(ctx); fgErr != nil {
85				klog.Error(fmt.Errorf("failed to connect to feature gates %w", fgErr))
86				runCancel()
87				<-ctx.Done()
88				return
89			}
90	
91			go ctrlcommon.StartMetricsListener(startOpts.promMetricsListenAddress, ctrlctx.Stop, ctrlcommon.RegisterMCCMetrics, startOpts.tlsMinVersion, startOpts.tlsCipherSuites)
92	
93			controllers := createControllers(ctrlctx)
94			draincontroller := drain.New(
95				drain.DefaultConfig(),
96				ctrlctx.KubeInformerFactory.Core().V1().Nodes(),
97				ctrlctx.InformerFactory.Machineconfiguration().V1().MachineConfigPools(),
98				ctrlctx.ClientBuilder.KubeClientOrDie("node-update-controller"),
99				ctrlctx.ClientBuilder.MachineConfigClientOrDie("node-update-controller"),
100				ctrlctx.FeatureGatesHandler,
101			)
102	
103			certrotationcontroller, err := certrotationcontroller.New(
104				ctrlctx.ClientBuilder.KubeClientOrDie("cert-rotation-controller"),
105				ctrlctx.ClientBuilder.ConfigClientOrDie("cert-rotation-controller"),
106				ctrlctx.ClientBuilder.MachineClientOrDie("cert-rotation-controller"),
107				ctrlctx.ClientBuilder.AROClientOrDie("cert-rotation-controller"),
108				ctrlctx.KubeMAOSharedInformer.Core().V1().Secrets(),
109				ctrlctx.KubeNamespacedInformerFactory.Core().V1().Secrets(),
110				ctrlctx.KubeNamespacedInformerFactory.Core().V1().ConfigMaps(),
111				ctrlctx.ConfigInformerFactory.Config().V1().Infrastructures(),
112				ctrlctx.FeatureGatesHandler,
113				ctrlctx.ClientBuilder.MachineConfigClientOrDie("cert-rotation-controller"),
114			)
115			if err != nil {
116				klog.Fatalf("unable to start cert rotation controller: %v", err)
117			}
118	
119			pinnedImageSet := pinnedimageset.New(
120				ctrlctx.InformerFactory.Machineconfiguration().V1().PinnedImageSets(),
121				ctrlctx.InformerFactory.Machineconfiguration().V1().MachineConfigPools(),
122				ctrlctx.ClientBuilder.KubeClientOrDie("pinned-image-set-controller"),
123				ctrlctx.ClientBuilder.MachineConfigClientOrDie("pinned-image-set-controller"),
124			)
125			go pinnedImageSet.Run(2, ctrlctx.Stop)
126	
127			// Start the shared factory informers that you need to use in your controller
128			ctrlctx.InformerFactory.Start(ctrlctx.Stop)
129			ctrlctx.KubeInformerFactory.Start(ctrlctx.Stop)
130			ctrlctx.OpenShiftConfigKubeNamespacedInformerFactory.Start(ctrlctx.Stop)
131			ctrlctx.OperatorInformerFactory.Start(ctrlctx.Stop)
132			ctrlctx.ConfigInformerFactory.Start(ctrlctx.Stop)
133			ctrlctx.KubeNamespacedInformerFactory.Start(ctrlctx.Stop)
134			ctrlctx.KubeMAOSharedInformer.Start(ctrlctx.Stop)
135			ctrlctx.OCLInformerFactory.Start(ctrlctx.Stop)
136	
137			close(ctrlctx.InformersStarted)
138	
139			if ctrlctx.FeatureGatesHandler.Enabled(features.FeatureGateNoRegistryClusterInstall) {
140				iriController := internalreleaseimage.New(
141					ctrlctx.InformerFactory.Machineconfiguration().V1alpha1().InternalReleaseImages(),
142					ctrlctx.InformerFactory.Machineconfiguration().V1().ControllerConfigs(),
143					ctrlctx.InformerFactory.Machineconfiguration().V1().MachineConfigs(),
144					ctrlctx.ConfigInformerFactory.Config().V1().ClusterVersions(),
145					ctrlctx.KubeInformerFactory.Core().V1().Secrets(),
146					ctrlctx.InformerFactory.Machineconfiguration().V1().MachineConfigNodes(),
147					ctrlctx.KubeInformerFactory.Core().V1().Nodes(),
148					ctrlctx.ConfigInformerFactory.Config().V1().Infrastructures(),
149					ctrlctx.ClientBuilder.KubeClientOrDie("internalreleaseimage-controller"),
150					ctrlctx.ClientBuilder.MachineConfigClientOrDie("internalreleaseimage-controller"))
151	
152				go iriController.Run(2, ctrlctx.Stop)
153				// start the informers again to enable feature gated types.
154				// see comments in SharedInformerFactory interface.
155				ctrlctx.InformerFactory.Start(ctrlctx.Stop)
156				ctrlctx.KubeInformerFactory.Start(ctrlctx.Stop)
157			}
158	
159			if ctrlcommon.IsBootImageControllerRequired(ctrlctx) {
160				bootImageController := bootimagecontroller.New(
161					ctrlctx.ClientBuilder.KubeClientOrDie("machine-set-boot-image-controller"),
162					ctrlctx.ClientBuilder.MachineClientOrDie("machine-set-boot-image-controller"),
163					ctrlctx.KubeNamespacedInformerFactory.Core().V1().ConfigMaps(),
164					ctrlctx.MachineInformerFactory.Machine().V1beta1().MachineSets(),
165					ctrlctx.MachineInformerFactory.Machine().V1().ControlPlaneMachineSets(),
166					ctrlctx.ConfigInformerFactory.Config().V1().Infrastructures(),
167					ctrlctx.ClientBuilder.OperatorClientOrDie(componentName),
168					ctrlctx.OperatorInformerFactory.Operator().V1().MachineConfigurations(),
169					ctrlctx.ConfigInformerFactory.Config().V1().ClusterVersions(),
170					ctrlctx.FeatureGatesHandler,
171				)
172				go bootImageController.Run(ctrlctx.Stop)
173				// start the informers again to enable feature gated types.
174				// see comments in SharedInformerFactory interface.
175				ctrlctx.KubeNamespacedInformerFactory.Start(ctrlctx.Stop)
176				ctrlctx.MachineInformerFactory.Start(ctrlctx.Stop)
177				ctrlctx.ConfigInformerFactory.Start(ctrlctx.Stop)
178				ctrlctx.OperatorInformerFactory.Start(ctrlctx.Stop)
179			}
180	
181			for _, c := range controllers {
182				go c.Run(2, ctrlctx.Stop)
183			}
184			go draincontroller.Run(5, ctrlctx.Stop)
185			go certrotationcontroller.Run(ctx, 1)
186	
187			// wait here in this function until the context gets cancelled (which tells us when we are being shut down)
188			<-ctx.Done()
189		}
190	
191		leaderElectionCfg := common.GetDefaultLeaderElectionConfig()
192	
193		leaderelection.RunOrDie(runContext, leaderelection.LeaderElectionConfig{
194			Lock:            common.CreateResourceLock(cb, startOpts.resourceLockNamespace, componentName),
195			ReleaseOnCancel: true,
196			LeaseDuration:   leaderElectionCfg.LeaseDuration.Duration,
197			RenewDeadline:   leaderElectionCfg.RenewDeadline.Duration,
198			RetryPeriod:     leaderElectionCfg.RetryPeriod.Duration,
199			Callbacks: leaderelection.LeaderCallbacks{
200				OnStartedLeading: run,
201				OnStoppedLeading: func() {
202					klog.Infof("Stopped leading. Terminating.")
203					os.Exit(0)
204				},
205			},
206		})
207		panic("unreachable")
208	}

210	func createControllers(ctx *ctrlcommon.ControllerContext) []ctrlcommon.Controller {
211		// Only watch IRI informers when the feature gate is enabled. The
212		// InternalReleaseImages CRD is not installed on clusters where the gate is
213		// off, so the informer list call would fail and WaitForCacheSync in the
214		// template controller would block forever.
215		var iriSecretsInformer coreinformersv1.SecretInformer
216		var iriInformer mcfginformersv1alpha1.InternalReleaseImageInformer
217		if ctx.FeatureGatesHandler.Enabled(features.FeatureGateNoRegistryClusterInstall) {
218			iriSecretsInformer = ctx.KubeInformerFactory.Core().V1().Secrets()
219			iriInformer = ctx.InformerFactory.Machineconfiguration().V1alpha1().InternalReleaseImages()
220		}
221	
222		var controllers []ctrlcommon.Controller
223		controllers = append(controllers,
224			// Our primary MCs come from here
225			template.New(
226				rootOpts.templates,
227				ctx.InformerFactory.Machineconfiguration().V1().ControllerConfigs(),
228				ctx.OpenShiftConfigKubeNamespacedInformerFactory.Core().V1().Secrets(),
229				iriSecretsInformer,
230				iriInformer,
231				ctx.ConfigInformerFactory.Config().V1().APIServers(),
232				ctx.ClientBuilder.KubeClientOrDie("template-controller"),
233				ctx.ClientBuilder.MachineConfigClientOrDie("template-controller"),
234				ctx.FeatureGatesHandler,
235			),
236			// Add all "sub-renderers here"
237			kubeletconfig.New(
238				rootOpts.templates,
239				ctx.InformerFactory.Machineconfiguration().V1().MachineConfigPools(),
240				ctx.InformerFactory.Machineconfiguration().V1().ControllerConfigs(),
241				ctx.InformerFactory.Machineconfiguration().V1().KubeletConfigs(),
242				ctx.ConfigInformerFactory.Config().V1().FeatureGates(),
243				ctx.ConfigInformerFactory.Config().V1().Nodes(),
244				ctx.ConfigInformerFactory.Config().V1().APIServers(),
245				ctx.ClientBuilder.KubeClientOrDie("kubelet-config-controller"),
246				ctx.ClientBuilder.MachineConfigClientOrDie("kubelet-config-controller"),
247				ctx.ClientBuilder.ConfigClientOrDie("kubelet-config-controller"),
248				ctx.FeatureGatesHandler,
249			),
250			containerruntimeconfig.New(
251				rootOpts.templates,
252				ctx.InformerFactory.Machineconfiguration().V1().MachineConfigPools(),
253				ctx.InformerFactory.Machineconfiguration().V1().ControllerConfigs(),
254				ctx.InformerFactory.Machineconfiguration().V1().ContainerRuntimeConfigs(),
255				ctx.ConfigInformerFactory.Config().V1().Images(),
256				ctx.ConfigInformerFactory.Config().V1().ImageDigestMirrorSets(),
257				ctx.ConfigInformerFactory.Config().V1().ImageTagMirrorSets(),
258				ctx.ConfigInformerFactory,
259				ctx.OperatorInformerFactory.Operator().V1alpha1().ImageContentSourcePolicies(),
260				ctx.ConfigInformerFactory.Config().V1().ClusterVersions(),
261				ctx.ClientBuilder.KubeClientOrDie("container-runtime-config-controller"),
262				ctx.ClientBuilder.MachineConfigClientOrDie("container-runtime-config-controller"),
263				ctx.ClientBuilder.ConfigClientOrDie("container-runtime-config-controller"),
264				ctx.FeatureGatesHandler,
265			),
266			// The renderer creates "rendered" MCs from the MC fragments generated by
267			// the above sub-controllers, which are then consumed by the node controller
268			render.New(
269				ctx.InformerFactory.Machineconfiguration().V1().MachineConfigPools(),
270				ctx.InformerFactory.Machineconfiguration().V1().MachineConfigs(),
271				ctx.InformerFactory.Machineconfiguration().V1().ControllerConfigs(),
272				ctx.InformerFactory.Machineconfiguration().V1().ContainerRuntimeConfigs(),
273				ctx.InformerFactory.Machineconfiguration().V1().KubeletConfigs(),
274				ctx.OperatorInformerFactory.Operator().V1().MachineConfigurations(),
275				ctx.InformerFactory.Machineconfiguration().V1().OSImageStreams(),
276				ctx.ClientBuilder.KubeClientOrDie("render-controller"),
277				ctx.ClientBuilder.MachineConfigClientOrDie("render-controller"),
278				ctx.FeatureGatesHandler,
279			),
280			// The node controller consumes data written by the above
281			node.New(
282				ctx.InformerFactory.Machineconfiguration().V1().ControllerConfigs(),
283				ctx.InformerFactory.Machineconfiguration().V1().MachineConfigs(),
284				ctx.InformerFactory.Machineconfiguration().V1().MachineConfigPools(),
285				ctx.KubeInformerFactory.Core().V1().Nodes(),
286				ctx.KubeInformerFactory.Core().V1().Pods(),
287				ctx.OCLInformerFactory.Machineconfiguration().V1().MachineOSConfigs(),
288				ctx.OCLInformerFactory.Machineconfiguration().V1().MachineOSBuilds(),
289				ctx.InformerFactory.Machineconfiguration().V1().MachineConfigNodes(),
290				ctx.ConfigInformerFactory.Config().V1().Schedulers(),
291				ctx.OperatorInformerFactory.Operator().V1().MachineConfigurations(),
292				ctx.InformerFactory.Machineconfiguration().V1().OSImageStreams(),
293				ctx.ConfigInformerFactory.Config().V1().Infrastructures(),
294				ctx.ClientBuilder.KubeClientOrDie("node-update-controller"),
295				ctx.ClientBuilder.MachineConfigClientOrDie("node-update-controller"),
296				ctx.FeatureGatesHandler,
297			),
298		)
299	
300		return controllers
301	}

88		templatesDir string,
89		ccInformer mcfginformersv1.ControllerConfigInformer,

91		iriSecretsInformer coreinformersv1.SecretInformer,

102		ctrl := &Controller{
103			templatesDir:  templatesDir,
104			client:        mcfgClient,

106			eventRecorder: ctrlcommon.NamespacedEventRecorder(eventBroadcaster.NewRecorder(scheme.Scheme, corev1.EventSource{Component: "machineconfigcontroller-templatecontroller"})),
107			queue: workqueue.NewTypedRateLimitingQueueWithConfig[string](

113			AddFunc:    ctrl.addControllerConfig,
114			UpdateFunc: ctrl.updateControllerConfig,
115			// This will enter the sync loop and no-op, because the controllerconfig has been deleted from the store.

1	package render
2	
3	import (
4		//nolint:gosec
5		"crypto/md5"
6		"fmt"
7	
8		"github.com/ghodss/yaml"
9		mcfgv1 "github.com/openshift/api/machineconfiguration/v1"
10		ctrlcommon "github.com/openshift/machine-config-operator/pkg/controller/common"
11	)
12	
13	var (
14		// salt is 80 random bytes.
15		// The salt was generated by `od -vAn -N80 -tu1 < /dev/urandom`. Do not change it.
16		salt = []byte{
17			16, 124, 206, 228, 139, 56, 175, 175, 79, 229, 134, 118, 157, 154, 211, 110,
18			25, 93, 47, 253, 172, 106, 37, 7, 174, 13, 160, 185, 110, 17, 87, 52,
19			219, 131, 12, 206, 218, 141, 116, 135, 188, 181, 192, 151, 233, 62, 126, 165,
20			64, 83, 179, 119, 15, 168, 208, 197, 146, 107, 58, 227, 133, 188, 238, 26,
21			33, 26, 235, 202, 32, 173, 31, 234, 41, 144, 148, 79, 6, 206, 23, 22,
22		}
23	)
24	
25	// Given a config from a pool, generate a name for the config
26	// of the form rendered-<poolname>-<hash>
27	func getMachineConfigHashedName(pool *mcfgv1.MachineConfigPool, config *mcfgv1.MachineConfig) (string, error) {
28		if config == nil {
29			return "", fmt.Errorf("empty machineconfig object")
30		}
31	
32		data, err := yaml.Marshal(config.Spec)
33		if err != nil {
34			return "", err
35		}
36	
37		h, err := hashData(data)
38		if err != nil {
39			return "", err
40		}
41		return fmt.Sprintf("%s%s-%x", ctrlcommon.RenderedMachineConfigPrefix, pool.GetName(), h), nil
42	}
43	
44	func hashData(data []byte) ([]byte, error) {
45		//nolint:gosec
46		hasher := md5.New()
47		if _, err := hasher.Write(salt); err != nil {
48			return nil, fmt.Errorf("error computing hash: %w", err)
49		}
50		if _, err := hasher.Write(data); err != nil {
51			return nil, fmt.Errorf("error computing hash: %w", err)
52		}
53		return hasher.Sum(nil), nil
54	}
